why: The single upload zone is at the top of the image section. Once a main image exists and the operator scrolls to the additional-images grid, there is no upload affordance nearby — requiring a scroll back up.
intended_outcome_statement: CatalogProductForm renders two ImageDropZone instances: the original above MainImagePanel, and a second above AdditionalImagesPanel (visible only when imageEntries.length > 0). Both share the same upload logic but have independent file inputs and drag state.
